description: Add a screenshot button that captures the grid (without UI chrome) as a PNG, plus a clipboard copy option. Uses canvas rendering to recreate the grid visually.

tasks.title: Add Screenshot CSS styles
tasks.description: Add CSS for screenshot button, screenshot modal overlay with download and copy buttons, and toast confirmations.
tasks.details: Add styles for #screenshot-overlay modal with a preview canvas, download/copy/close buttons. Style should be consistent with the save modal.

tasks.title: Add Screenshot button to controls bar
tasks.description: Add a 📸 button in the controls bar (after the biome button, before the help button).
tasks.details: Button: <button class='btn' id='btn-screenshot' onclick='openScreenshotModal()' style='...' title='Take screenshot'>📸</button>

tasks.title: Add Screenshot modal HTML
tasks.description: Add a modal overlay with canvas preview, download button, and clipboard copy button.
tasks.details: Modal with id='screenshot-overlay', contains a canvas for preview, a download button, a copy button, and a close button.

tasks.title: Implement renderScreenshotCanvas() function
tasks.description: Render the grid to a canvas without UI chrome. Must include: grass background, track SVGs, scenery emojis, trains, water tiles with color, bridge styling, tunnel visuals, switch levers, connection dots. Use larger canvas (COLS * 60 x ROWS * 60) for crisp output.
tasks.details: Creates a full-resolution canvas that draws: (1) grass background respecting biome/night mode, (2) water cells as solid blue fills, (3) track pieces by drawing path representations, (4) scenery as text emojis via fillText, (5) train markers as colored circles. The approach should use the existing renderThumbnail() pattern but at higher resolution with more detail.

tasks.title: Implement openScreenshotModal() function
tasks.description: Opens a modal showing a preview of the captured screenshot with download and copy options.
tasks.details: Calls renderScreenshotCanvas() to get a canvas, displays it in the modal preview area, wires up download and copy buttons.

tasks.title: Implement downloadScreenshot() function
tasks.description: Downloads the screenshot canvas as a PNG file named train-tracks-YYYY-MM-DD.png.
tasks.details: Uses canvas.toBlob() -> URL.createObjectURL() -> anchor click pattern for clean download.

tasks.title: Implement copyScreenshot() function
tasks.description: Copies the screenshot to clipboard using navigator.clipboard.write() with ClipboardItem.
tasks.details: Uses canvas.toBlob() -> new ClipboardItem -> navigator.clipboard.write(). Falls back to toast error if clipboard API unavailable.

tasks.title: Add keyboard shortcut P for screenshot
tasks.description: Add P key as keyboard shortcut for screenshot (only when not playing).
tasks.details: Add after the H/tutorial shortcut block. Also add to shortcuts modal HTML and mobile drawer.

tasks.title: Add screenshot button to mobile drawer
tasks.description: Ensure screenshot is accessible on mobile via the bottom drawer controls area.
tasks.details: Add screenshot button to mobile controls section if exists.

acceptance_criteria: AC1: 📸 button visible in controls bar
AC2: Clicking 📸 opens modal with canvas preview of current grid
AC3: Preview shows all visual elements: tracks, scenery, trains, water, biome colors
AC4: Download button saves PNG file named train-tracks-YYYY-MM-DD.png
AC5: Copy button copies PNG to clipboard (navigator.clipboard.write)
AC6: Toast confirmation shows '📸 Saved!' on download, '📋 Copied!' on copy
AC7: No UI chrome in the screenshot (no sidebar, controls, or buttons)
AC8: Works in both day and night modes (correct background colors)
AC9: Works across biomes (correct grass/sky colors)
AC10: P keyboard shortcut opens screenshot modal
AC11: Escape closes the screenshot modal
AC12: Modal can be closed by clicking outside it
testing_focus: Verify screenshot captures grid content correctly
Test in night mode — should use dark colors
Test with complex layout (water, bridges, tunnels, trains, scenery)
Test clipboard copy in supported browsers
Test that P shortcut works and doesn't fire during play
Test that modal closes on Escape and outside click
Verify no regressions in existing controls
